channel.title: sobolevn/awesome-cryptography Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: sobolevn/awesome-cryptography Jun 14th - Jun 20th, 2021
item.description:
Theory

Courses

  • A Self-Study Course In Block-Cipher Cryptanalysis - This paper attempts to organize the existing literature of block-cipher cryptanalysis in a way that students can use to learn cryptanalytic techniques and ways to break algorithms, by Bruce Schneier.

    • Frameworks and Libs

    JavaScript

  • bcrypt-Node.js - Native implementation of bcrypt for Node.js.
  • crypticostars1.1k - Easy-to-use encryption system utilizing RSA and AES for JavaScript.
  • cryptojsstars313 - Provide standard and secure cryptographic algorithms for Node.js.
  • forgestars3.9k - Native implementation of TLS in JavaScript and tools to write crypto-based and network-heavy webapps.
  • IronNode - Transform encryption library, a variant of proxy re-encryption, for encrypting to users or groups, and easily adding strong data controls to Node.js apps.
  • js-naclstars466 - Pure-JavaScript High-level API to Emscripten-compiled libsodium routines.
  • jsencryptstars5.1k - JavaScript library to perform OpenSSL RSA Encryption, Decryption, and Key Generation.
  • JShashesstars631 - Fast and dependency-free cryptographic hashing library for Node.js and browsers (supports MD5, SHA1, SHA256, SHA512, RIPEMD, HMAC).
  • jsThemis - JavaScript wrapper on Themis. High level crypto library for storing data (AES), secure messaging (ECC + ECDSA / RSA + PSS + PKCS#7) and session-oriented, forward secrecy data exchange (ECDH key agreement, ECC & AES encryption).
  • milagro-crypto-jsstars11 - MCJS is a standards compliant JavaScript cryptographic library with no external dependencies except for the random seed source. Compatible for Node.js and browser. It supports RSA, ECDH, ECIES, ECDSA, AES-GCM, SHA2, SHA3, Pairing-Based Cryptography and New Hope.
  • node.bcrypt.jsstars5.9k - bcrypt for Node.js.
  • sjclstars6.5k - Stanford JavaScript Crypto Library.

    • Frameworks and Libs

    Objective-C

  • ObjC Themis - ObjC wrapper on Themis for iOS and macOS. High level crypto library for storing data (AES), secure messaging (ECC + ECDSA / RSA + PSS + PKCS#7) and session-oriented, forward secrecy data exchange (ECDH key agreement, ECC & AES encryption).

    • Frameworks and Libs

    Swift

  • OpenSSLstars38 - Swift OpenSSL for macOS and Linux.
  • Swift-Sodiumstars404 - Swift interface to the Sodium library for common crypto operations for iOS and macOS.
  • SwiftThemis - Swift wrapper on Themis for iOS and macOS. High level crypto library for storing data (AES), secure messaging (ECC + ECDSA / RSA + PSS + PKCS#7) and session-oriented, forward secrecy data exchange (ECDH key agreement, ECC & AES encryption).

item.title: sobolevn/awesome-cryptography Jun 7th - Jun 13th, 2021
item.description:
Theory

Asymmetric encryption

  • ECC - Public-key cryptosystems based on the algebraic structure of elliptic curves over finite fields.
  • RSA - One of the first practical public-key cryptosystems and is widely used for secure data transmission. In RSA, this asymmetry is based on the practical difficulty of factoring the product of two large prime numbers, the factoring problem.

    • Resources

    Web-sites

  • Cryptocurrencies Dashboard - A dashboard of most active cryptocurrencies discussed on Reddit.

item.title: sobolevn/awesome-cryptography Apr 19th - Apr 25th, 2021
item.description:
Theory

Asymmetric encryption

  • DH - A method of exchanging cryptographic keys securely over a public channel. Unlike RSA, the Diffie-Hellman Key Exchange is not encryption, and is only a way for two parties to agree on a shared secret value. Since the keys generated are completely pseudo-random, DH key exchanges can provide forward secrecy (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Forward_secrecy).

item.title: sobolevn/awesome-cryptography Feb 22nd - Feb 28th, 2021
item.description:
Resources

Web-sites

  • TikZ for Cryptographers - A collection of block diagrams of common cryptographic functions drawn in TikZ to be used in research papers and presentations written in LaTeX.

item.title: sobolevn/awesome-cryptography Feb 8th - Feb 14th, 2021
item.description:
Tools

Standalone

  • Databunker - API based personal data or PII storage service built to comply with GDPR and CCPA.

item.title: sobolevn/awesome-cryptography Dec 14th - Dec 20th, 2020
item.description:
Frameworks and Libs

Rust

  • mundanestars1k - is a Rust cryptography library backed by BoringSSL that is difficult to misuse, ergonomic, and performant.

item.title: sobolevn/awesome-cryptography Oct 5th - Oct 11th, 2020
item.description:
Frameworks and Libs

Clojure

  • secrets.cljstars55 - A Clojure library designed to generate cryptographically strong random numbers suitable for managing data such as passwords, account authentication, security tokens, and related secrets.

item.title: sobolevn/awesome-cryptography Jul 27th - Aug 2nd, 2020
item.description:
Tools

Playgrounds

  • Cryptography Playground - A simple web tool to play and learn basic concepts of cryptography like, hashing, symmetric, asymmetric, zkp etc.

item.title: sobolevn/awesome-cryptography Jun 22nd - Jun 28th, 2020
item.description:
Theory

Articles

  • Password Insecurity - This article is written for everybody who is interested in password security.

    • Frameworks and Libs

    Python

  • django-cryptographystars208 - Easily encrypt data in Django.

    • Resources

    Web-sites

  • Applied Crypto Hardening - A lot ready to use best practice examples for securing web servers and more.

item.title: sobolevn/awesome-cryptography Apr 6th - Apr 12th, 2020
item.description:
Resources

Web-sites

  • Cryptohack - A platform with lots of interactive cryptography challenges, similar to Cryptopals.

item.title: sobolevn/awesome-cryptography Feb 10th - Feb 16th, 2020
item.description:
Frameworks and Libs

C

  • monocypher - small, portable, easy to use crypto library inspired by libsodium and TweetNaCl.

    • Frameworks and Libs

    JavaScript

  • noble - high-security, easily auditable set of contained cryptographic libraries and tools. Zero dependencies each.
    • noble-bls12-381stars78 — BLS12-381 pairing-friendly curve (threshold sigs).
    • noble-ed25519stars93 — ed25519 curve + ristretto255 (encryption, sigs).
    • noble-ripemd160stars14 — RIPEMD160 hash.
    • noble-secp256k1stars80 — secp256k1 Koblitz curve (encryption, ECDH, sigs).

item.title: sobolevn/awesome-cryptography Feb 3rd - Feb 9th, 2020
item.description:
Theory

Books

  • The Code Book - This book is a digest of the history of cryptography, covering both ancient times, and newer cryptography methods. There are exercises at the end and the solution of those was rewarded with $10.000.

item.title: sobolevn/awesome-cryptography Oct 14th - Oct 20th, 2019
item.description:
Resources

Web-tools

  • factordb.com - Factordb.com is tool used to store known factorizations of any number.

item.title: sobolevn/awesome-cryptography Jul 15th - Jul 21st, 2019
item.description:
Theory

Books

  • Real World Cryptography - This book teaches you applied cryptographic techniques to understand and apply security at every level of your systems and applications.

item.title: sobolevn/awesome-cryptography Jul 1st - Jul 7th, 2019
item.description:
Frameworks and Libs

C

  • milagro-crypto-cstars18 - Small, self-contained and fast open source crypto library. It supports RSA, ECDH, ECIES, ECDSA, AES-GCM, SHA2, SHA3 and Pairing-Based Cryptography.

item.title: sobolevn/awesome-cryptography Jun 10th - Jun 16th, 2019
item.description:
Resources

Web-tools

  • Boxentriq - Easy to use tools for analysis and code-breaking of the most frequent ciphers, including Vigenère, Beaufort, Keyed Caesar, Transposition Ciphers, etc.

item.title: sobolevn/awesome-cryptography Jan 28th - Feb 3rd, 2019
item.description:
Frameworks and Libs

Python

  • Crypto-Vinaigrettestars11 - Quantum resistant asymmetric key generation tool for digital signatures.

item.title: sobolevn/awesome-cryptography Jan 21st - Jan 27th, 2019
item.description:
Tools

Standalone

  • ves - End-to-end encrypted sharing via cloud repository, secure recovery through a viral network of friends in case of key loss.

    • Frameworks and Libs

    C

  • libVES.cstars26 - End-to-end encrypted sharing via cloud repository, secure recovery through a viral network of friends in case of key loss.

    • Frameworks and Libs

    JavaScript

  • libVES.jsstars5 - End-to-end encrypted sharing via cloud repository, secure recovery through a viral network of friends in case of key loss.

item.title: sobolevn/awesome-cryptography Dec 31st - Jan 6th, 2018
item.description:
Tools

Standalone

  • Coherencestars19 - Cryptographic server for modern web apps.

item.title: sobolevn/awesome-cryptography Dec 17th - Dec 23rd, 2018
item.description:
Frameworks and Libs

Java

  • jbcrypt - jBCrypt is an implementation the OpenBSD Blowfish password hashing

item.title: sobolevn/awesome-cryptography Nov 26th - Dec 2nd, 2018
item.description:
Frameworks and Libs

Rust

  • dalek cryptography - Fast yet safe mid-level API for ECC, Bulletproofs, and more.
  • recryptstars85 - A pure-Rust library that implements cryptographic primitives for building a multi-hop Proxy Re-encryption scheme, known as Transform Encryption.

    • Frameworks and Libs

    JavaScript

  • IronWeb - Transform encryption library, a variant of proxy re-encryption, for easily managing end-to-end encryption securely in the browser.

    • Theory

    Transform Encryption

  • Transform Encryption (aka Proxy Re-Encryption) - Transform encryption uses three mathematically related keys: one to encrypt plaintext to a recipient, a second to decrypt the ciphertext, and a third to transform ciphertext encrypted to one recipient so it can be decrypted by a different recipient.

    • Frameworks and Libs

    Scala

  • recryptstars24 - Transform encryption library for Scala.

    • Resources

    Blogs

  • Salty Hash - Covers topics on encryption, data control, privacy, and security.

    • Theory

    Books

  • Practical Cryptography for Developers - Developer-friendly book on modern cryptography (hashes, MAC codes, symmetric and asymmetric ciphers, key exchange, elliptic curves, digital signatures) with lots of code examples.

item.title: sobolevn/awesome-cryptography Oct 22nd - Oct 28th, 2018
item.description:
Tools

Standalone

  • sopsstars7.4k - sops is an editor of encrypted files that supports YAML, JSON and BINARY formats and encrypts with AWS KMS, GCP KMS, Azure Key Vault and PGP.

item.title: sobolevn/awesome-cryptography Aug 6th - Aug 12th, 2018
item.description:
Theory

Other lists

  • Awesome HEstars265 – A curated list of homomorphic encryption libraries, software and resources.

item.title: sobolevn/awesome-cryptography Jul 30th - Aug 5th, 2018
item.description:
Theory

Other lists

  • Awesome crypto-papersstars1k – A curated list of cryptography papers, articles, tutorials and howtos.

item.title: sobolevn/awesome-cryptography Jul 23rd - Jul 29th, 2018
item.description:
Theory

Books

  • Serious Cryptography - A Practical Introduction to Modern Encryption by Jean-Philippe Aumasson.

item.title: sobolevn/awesome-cryptography Jun 25th - Jul 1st, 2018
item.description:
Frameworks and Libs

C-sharp

  • Microsoft .NET Framework Cryptography Model - The .NET Framework implementations of many standard cryptographic algorithms.

item.title: sobolevn/awesome-cryptography Jun 18th - Jun 24th, 2018
item.description:
Tools

Standalone

  • ironsshstars60 - End-to-end encrypt transferred files using sftp/scp and selectively share with others. Automatic key management works with any SSH server. Encrypted files are gpg compatible.

item.title: sobolevn/awesome-cryptography Feb 12th - Feb 18th, 2018
item.description:
Frameworks and Libs

Java

  • GDHstars30 - Generalized Diffie-Hellman key exchange Java library for multiple parties built on top of the Vert.x framework.

    • Frameworks and Libs

    Scala

  • tsecstars338 - A type-safe, functional, general purpose security and cryptography library.

item.title: sobolevn/awesome-cryptography Nov 13th - Nov 19th, 2017
item.description:
Frameworks and Libs

Rust

  • proteusstars394 - Axolotl protocol implementation, without header keys, in Rust.

item.title: sobolevn/awesome-cryptography Nov 6th - Nov 12th, 2017
item.description:
Frameworks and Libs

Objective-C

  • ObjectivePGPstars561 - ObjectivePGP is an implementation of OpenPGP protocol for iOS and macOS. OpenPGP is the most widely used email encryption standard.

item.title: sobolevn/awesome-cryptography Sep 25th - Oct 1st, 2017
item.description:
Frameworks and Libs

C

  • themisstars1.3k - High level crypto library for storing data (AES), secure messaging (ECC + ECDSA / RSA + PSS + PKCS#7) and session-oriented, forward secrecy data exchange (ECDH key agreement, ECC & AES encryption). Ported on many languages and platforms, suitable for client-server infastructures.

    • Frameworks and Libs

    Go

  • goThemis - Go wrapper on Themis. High level crypto library for storing data (AES), secure messaging (ECC + ECDSA / RSA + PSS + PKCS#7) and session-oriented, forward secrecy data exchange (ECDH key agreement, ECC & AES encryption).

    • Frameworks and Libs

    Java

  • Java Themis - Java/Android wrapper on Themis. High level crypto library for storing data (AES), secure messaging (ECC + ECDSA / RSA + PSS + PKCS#7) and session-oriented, forward secrecy data exchange (ECDH key agreement, ECC & AES encryption).

    • Frameworks and Libs

    PHP

  • PHP Themis - PHP wrapper on Themis. High level crypto library for storing data (AES), secure messaging (ECC + ECDSA / RSA + PSS + PKCS#7) and session-oriented, forward secrecy data exchange (ECDH key agreement, ECC & AES encryption).

    • Frameworks and Libs

    Python

  • pythemis - Python wrapper on Themis. High level crypto library for storing data (AES), secure messaging (ECC + ECDSA / RSA + PSS + PKCS#7) and session-oriented, forward secrecy data exchange (ECDH key agreement, ECC & AES encryption).

    • Frameworks and Libs

    Ruby

  • Ruby Themis - Ruby wrapper on Themis. High level crypto library for storing data (AES), secure messaging (ECC + ECDSA / RSA + PSS + PKCS#7) and session-oriented, forward secrecy data exchange (ECDH key agreement, ECC & AES encryption).

item.title: sobolevn/awesome-cryptography Sep 18th - Sep 24th, 2017
item.description:
Frameworks and Libs

Python

  • Privystars230 - An easy, fast lib to correctly password-protect your data.

item.title: sobolevn/awesome-cryptography Aug 7th - Aug 13th, 2017
item.description:
Theory

Symmetric encryption

  • 3DES - Symmetric-key block cipher (or Triple Data Encryption Algorithm (TDEA or Triple DEA), which applies the Data Encryption Standard (DES) cipher algorithm three times to each data block.

item.title: sobolevn/awesome-cryptography Jul 10th - Jul 16th, 2017
item.description:
Tools

Standalone

  • Nipestars1.1k - Nipe is a script to make Tor Network your default gateway.

    • Frameworks and Libs

    Clojure

  • clj-cryptostars27 - Wrapper for Bouncy Castle.

    • Frameworks and Libs

    PHP

  • libsodium-laravelstars20 - Laravel Package Abstraction using libsodium.

    • Frameworks and Libs

    Java

  • Google Tinkstars11.3k - A small crypto library that provides a safe, simple, agile and fast way to accomplish some common crypto tasks.

item.title: sobolevn/awesome-cryptography Dec 5th - Dec 11th, 2016
item.description:
Resources

Web-tools

  • CyberChef - a web app for encryption, encoding, compression, and data analysis.

item.title: sobolevn/awesome-cryptography Oct 31st - Nov 6th, 2016
item.description:
Resources

Web-sites

  • Cryptopals Crypto Challenges - A series of applied cryptography challenges, starting from very basic challenges, such as hex to base 64 challanges, and gradually increasing the difficulty up to abstract algebra.

item.title: sobolevn/awesome-cryptography Oct 17th - Oct 23rd, 2016
item.description:
Theory

Courses

  • Cryptography - A practical oriented course in Cryptography by University of Maryland College Park.

item.title: sobolevn/awesome-cryptography Oct 3rd - Oct 9th, 2016
item.description:
Theory

Articles

  • Secure Account Recovery Made Simple.

    • Frameworks and Libs

    Swift

  • IDZSwiftCommonCryptostars451 - Wrapper for Apple's CommonCrypto library written in Swift.

item.title: sobolevn/awesome-cryptography Sep 26th - Oct 2nd, 2016
item.description:
Frameworks and Libs

Haskell

  • cryptolstars949 - The Language of Cryptography.

    • Frameworks and Libs

    JavaScript

  • jsrsasignstars2.6k - The 'jsrsasign' (RSA-Sign JavaScript Library) is an opensource free cryptography library supporting RSA/RSAPSS/ECDSA/DSA signing/validation.

    • Frameworks and Libs

    Rust

  • rustlsstars2.6k - Rustls is a new, modern TLS library written in Rust.

item.title: sobolevn/awesome-cryptography Sep 5th - Sep 11th, 2016
item.description:
Theory

Articles

  • How to Generate Secure Random Numbers in Various Programming Languages.

item.title: sobolevn/awesome-cryptography Aug 15th - Aug 21st, 2016
item.description:
Theory

Books

  • Introduction to Modern Cryptography - Introductory-level treatment of cryptography written from a modern, computer science perspective.

item.title: sobolevn/awesome-cryptography Aug 8th - Aug 14th, 2016
item.description:
Theory

Symmetric encryption

  • AES - Symmetric-key block cipher algorithm and U.S. government standard for secure and classified data encryption and decryption (also known as Rijndael).
  • Blowfish - Symmetric-key block cipher, designed in 1993 by Bruce Schneier. Notable features of the design include key-dependent S-boxes and a highly complex key schedule.

    • Theory

    Hash functions

  • MD5 - Widely used hash function producing a 128-bit hash value. MD5 was initially designed to be used as a cryptographic hash function, but it has been found to suffer from extensive vulnerabilities. It can still be used as a checksum to verify data integrity, but only against unintentional corruption.
  • SHA1 - Cryptographic hash function designed by the NSA. SHA-1 produces a 160-bit hash value known as a message digest. SHA-1 is no longer considered secure against well-funded opponents.
  • SHA2 - Set of hash functions designed by the NSA. SHA-256 and SHA-512 are novel hash functions computed with 32-bit and 64-bit words, respectively. They use different shift amounts and additive constants, but their structures are otherwise virtually identical, differing only in the number of rounds.

    • Theory

    Books

  • An Introduction to Mathematical Cryptography - Introduction to modern cryptography.

    • Tools

    Standalone

  • Bcrypt - Cross-platform file encryption utility.
  • certbotstars28k - Previously the Let's Encrypt Client, is EFF's tool to obtain certs from Let's Encrypt, and (optionally) auto-enable HTTPS on your server. It can also act as a client for any other CA that uses the ACME protocol.
  • gpg - Complete and free implementation of the OpenPGP standard. It allows to encrypt and sign your data and communication, features a versatile key management system. GnuPG is a command line tool with features for easy integration with other applications.

    • Tools

    Git

  • git-secret - Bash-tool to store your private data inside a git repository.

    • Frameworks and Libs

    C

  • libgcrypt - Cryptographic library developed as a separated module of GnuPG.
  • libsodiumstars9.2k - Modern and easy-to-use crypto library.
  • libtomcryptstars1.1k - Fairly comprehensive, modular and portable cryptographic toolkit.
  • NaCl - High-speed library for network communication, encryption, decryption, signatures, etc.
  • wolfSSLstars1.1k - Small, fast, portable implementation of TLS/SSL for embedded devices to the cloud.

    • Frameworks and Libs

    C++

  • Botan - Cryptography library written in C++11.
  • HElibstars192 - Software library that implements homomorphic encryption (HE).
  • Nettle - Low-level cryptographic library.
  • s2nstars4k - Implementation of the TLS/SSL protocols.

    • Frameworks and Libs

    C-sharp

  • libsodium-netstars335 - Secure cryptographic library, port of libsodium for .NET.
  • PCLCryptostars210 - Provides cryptographic APIs over algorithms implemented by the platform, including exposing them to portable libraries.

    • Frameworks and Libs

    Common Lisp

  • trivial-sshstars35 - SSH client library for Common Lisp (Built on libssh2).

    • Frameworks and Libs

    Elixir

  • elixir-rsastars30 - :public_key cryptography wrapper for Elixir.
  • ex_cryptostars91 - Elixir wrapper for Erlang :crypto and :public_key modules. Provides sensible defaults for many crypto functions to make them easier to use.

    • Frameworks and Libs

    Erlang

  • crypto - Functions for computation of message digests, and functions for encryption and decryption.
  • public_key - Provides functions to handle public-key infrastructure.

    • Frameworks and Libs

    Haskell

  • Cryptography - Collaborative Hackage list.
  • Cryptonite - Haskell repository of cryptographic primitives.

    • Frameworks and Libs

    JavaScript

  • javascript-crypto-librarystars279 - JavaScript Crypto Library provides web developers with an extensive and efficient set of cryptographic functions.
  • PolyCryptstars264 - Pure JS implementation of the WebCrypto API.

    • Frameworks and Libs

    Java

  • Flexiprovider - Powerful toolkit for the Java Cryptography Architecture.

    • Frameworks and Libs

    Julia

  • Crypto.jlstars6 - Library that wraps OpenSSL, but also has pure Julia implementations for reference.
  • MbedTLS.jlstars24 - Wrapper around the mbed TLS and cryptography C libary.

    • Frameworks and Libs

    Lua

  • lua-lockboxstars297 - Collection of cryptographic primitives written in pure Lua.

    • Frameworks and Libs

    PHP

  • halite - Simple library for encryption using libsodium.
  • PHP Encryptionstars3.3k - Library for encrypting data with a key or password in PHP.

    • Frameworks and Libs

    Python

  • charmstars367 - Framework for rapidly prototyping cryptosystems.
  • cryptography - Python library which exposes cryptographic recipes and primitives.
  • cryptopy - Pure python implmentation of cryptographic algorithms and applications.
  • paramiko - Python implementation of the SSHv2 protocol, providing both client and server functionality.
  • pycryptodomestars1.6k - Self-contained Python package of low-level cryptographic primitives.

    • Frameworks and Libs

    R

  • rscryptstars27 - Package for a collection of scrypt cryptographic functions.

    • Frameworks and Libs

    Ruby

  • bcrypt-rubystars1.7k - Ruby binding for the OpenBSD bcrypt() password hashing algorithm, allowing you to easily store a secure hash of your users' passwords.

    • Frameworks and Libs

    Rust

  • rust-cryptostars1k - Mostly pure-Rust implementation of various cryptographic algorithms.

    • Frameworks and Libs

    Swift

  • SweetHMACstars39 - Tiny and easy to use Swift class to encrypt strings using HMAC algorithms.
  • SwiftSSLstars181 - Elegant crypto toolkit in Swift.

    • Resources

    Blogs

  • Bristol Cryptography Blog - Official blog for the University of Bristol cryptography research group. It's a group blog, primarily targeted towards cryptographers and crypto students.

    • Resources

    Web-tools

  • CrypTool - Great variety of ciphers, encryption methods and analysis tools are introduced, often together with illustrated examples.

    • Resources

    Web-sites

  • Learn Cryptography - Dedicated to helping people understand how and why the cryptographic systems they use everyday without realizing work to secure and protect their privacy.

item.title: sobolevn/awesome-cryptography Jul 18th - Jul 24th, 2016
item.description:
Resources

Blogs

  • A Few Thoughts on Cryptographic Engineering - Some random thoughts about crypto.
  • Charles Engelke's Blog - WebCrypto Blog Posts.
  • Root Labs rdist - Nate Lawson and his co-authors write on a variety of topics including hardware implementation, cryptographic timing attacks, DRM, and the Commodore 64.
  • Schneier on security - One of the oldest and most famous security blogs. Bruce covers topics from block cipher cryptanalysis to airport security.

    • Resources

    Mailing lists

  • metzdowd.com - "Cryptography" is a low-noise moderated mailing list devoted to cryptographic technology and its political impact.
  • Modern Crypto - Forums for discussing modern cryptographic practice.
  • randombit.net - List for general discussion of cryptography, particularly the technical aspects.

item.title: sobolevn/awesome-cryptography Jul 4th - Jul 10th, 2016
item.description:
Frameworks and Libs

Haskell

  • scryptstars17 - Haskell bindings to Colin Percival's scrypt implementation.

    • Frameworks and Libs

    Python

  • bcryptstars740 - Modern password hashing for your software and your servers.

item.title: sobolevn/awesome-cryptography Jun 20th - Jun 26th, 2016
item.description:
Frameworks and Libs

Python

  • PyEllipticstars112 - Python OpenSSL wrapper. For modern cryptography with ECC, AES, HMAC, Blowfish.

    • Resources

    Web-sites

  • IACR - The International Association for Cryptologic Research is a non-profit scientific organization whose purpose is to further research in cryptology and related fields.
  • Subreddit of Cryptography - This subreddit is intended for links and discussions surrounding the theory and practice of strong cryptography.

    • Frameworks and Libs

    Haskell

  • HsOpenSSLstars20 - OpenSSL binding for Haskel.

    • Frameworks and Libs

    JavaScript

  • asmCryptostars599 - JavaScript implementation of popular cryptographic utilities with performance in mind.
  • cifrestars122 - Fast crypto toolkit for modern client-side JavaScript.
  • closure-library - Google's common JavaScript library.
  • libsodium.jsstars675 - libsodium compiled to pure JavaScript, with convenient wrappers.
  • OpenPGP.jsstars4.7k - OpenPGP implementation for JavaScript.
  • URSAstars608 - RSA public/private key OpenSSL bindings for Node.
  • crypto-jsstars11.1k - JavaScript library of crypto standards.
  • rushastars267 - High-performance pure-javascript SHA1 implementation suitable for large binary data, reaching up to half the native speed.

    • Tools

    Standalone

  • cryptomatorstars5.4k - Multi-platform transparent client-side encryption of your files in the cloud.

    • Tools

    Git

  • git-cryptstars5.5k - Transparent file encryption in git.

    • Frameworks and Libs

    C

  • OpenSSLstars15.6k - TLS/SSL and crypto library.
  • PolarSSL - PolarSSL makes it trivially easy for developers to include cryptographic and SSL/TLS capabilities in their (embedded) products, facilitating this functionality with a minimal coding footprint.
  • crypto-algorithmsstars1.1k - Basic implementations of standard cryptography algorithms, like AES and SHA-1.

    • Frameworks and Libs

    C++

  • cryptoppstars2.8k - Crypto++ Library is a free C++ class library of cryptographic schemes.

    • Frameworks and Libs

    C-sharp

  • SecurityDriven.Infernostars504 - .NET crypto done right.

    • Frameworks and Libs

    Go

  • dkeyczarstars112 - Port of Google's Keyczar cryptography library to Go.

    • Frameworks and Libs

    Julia

  • Nettle.jlstars37 - Julia wrapper around nettle cryptographic hashing/

    • Theory

    Books

  • Understanding Cryptography - Often overlooked, this book is a boon for beginners to the field. It contains plenty of exercises at the end of each chapter, aimed at reinforcing concepts and cementing ideas.
  • A Graduate Course in Applied Cryptography - The book covers many constructions for different tasks in cryptography.

    • Frameworks and Libs

    Scala

  • scryptostars174 - Cryptographic primitives for Scala.

    • Theory

    Courses

  • Journey into cryptography - The course of cryptography by Khan Academy.

item.title: sobolevn/awesome-cryptography May 30th - Jun 5th, 2016
item.description:
Resources

Web-tools

  • keybase.io - Keybase maps your identity to your public keys, and vice versa.
  • Cryptolab - is a set of cryptography related tools.

    • Tools

    Standalone

  • blackboxstars5.8k - safely store secrets in Git/Mercurial/Subversion.

    • Theory

    Courses

  • Crypto Strikes Back! - This talk will cover crypto vulnerabilities in widely-deployed systems and how the smallest oversight resulted in catastrophe.
  • Practical Aspects of Modern Cryptography - Practical Aspects of Modern Cryptography, Winter 2006 University of Washington CSE.
  • Theory and Practice of Cryptography - Introduction to Modern Cryptography, Using Cryptography in Practice and at Google, Proofs of Security and Security Definitions and A Special Topic in Cryptography.
  • Applied Cryptography - Cryptography is present in everyday life, from paying with a credit card to using the telephone. Learn all about making and breaking puzzles in computing.
  • Cryptography - Stanford University - This course explains the inner workings of cryptographic primitives and how to correctly use them. Students will learn how to reason about the security of cryptographic constructions and how to apply this knowledge to real-world applications.
  • Cryptography I - The course begins with a detailed discussion of how two parties who have a shared secret key can communicate securely when a powerful adversary eavesdrops and tampers with traffic. We will examine many deployed protocols and analyze mistakes in existing systems.
  • Cybrary Cryptography - This online course we will cover how cryptography is the cornerstone of security, and how through its use of different encryption methods, such as ciphers, and public or private keys, you can protect private or sensitive information from unauthorized access.

    • Resources

    Web-sites

  • Garykessler Crypto - An Overview of Cryptography.
  • WebCryptoAPI - This specification describes a JavaScript API for performing basic cryptographic operations in web applications, such as hashing, signature generation and verification, and encryption and decryption.
  • Cryptography Stackexchange - Cryptography Stack Exchange is a question and answer site for software developers, mathematicians and others interested in cryptography.

item.title: sobolevn/awesome-cryptography May 23rd - May 29th, 2016
item.description:
Theory

Books

  • Crypto101 - Crypto 101 is an introductory course on cryptography.
  • Cryptography Engineering - Learn to build cryptographic protocols that work in the real world.
  • Handbook of Applied Cryptography - This book is intended as a reference for professional cryptographers.
  • OpenSSL Cookbook - The book about OpenSSL.
  • Security Engineering - There is an extraordinary textbook written by Ross Anderson, professor of computer security at University of Cambridge.
  • The Cryptoparty Handbook - This book provides a comprehensive guide to the various topics of the computer and internet security.

    • Frameworks and Libs

    C

  • RHashstars359 - Great utility for computing hash sums.
  • tiny-AES128-Cstars2.6k - Small portable AES128 in C.
  • xxHashstars5.1k - Extremely fast hash algorithm.

    • Frameworks and Libs

    C-sharp

  • Bouncy Castle - All-purpose cryptographic library.
  • StreamCryptorstars113 - Stream encryption & decryption with libsodium and protobuf.

    • Frameworks and Libs

    Clojure

  • buddy-core - Cryptographic Api.
  • pandectstars218 - Fast and easy-to-use Message Digest, Checksum and HMAC library for Clojure.

    • Frameworks and Libs

    Common Lisp

  • crypto-shortcutsstars19 - Collection of common cryptography functions.
  • ironclad - Collection of common crypto shortcuts.

    • Frameworks and Libs

    Delphi

  • DelphiEncryptionCompendium - Cryptographic library for Delphi.
  • LockBox - LockBox 3 is a Delphi library for cryptography.
  • SynCrypto - Fast cryptographic routines (hashing and cypher), implementing AES, XOR, RC4, ADLER32, MD5, SHA1, SHA256 algorithms, optimized for speed.
  • TForge - TForge is open-source crypto library written in Delphi, compatible with FPC.

    • Frameworks and Libs

    Elixir

  • cipherstars55 - Elixir crypto library to encrypt/decrypt arbitrary binaries.
  • cloakstars425 - Cloak makes it easy to use encryption with Ecto.
  • comeoninstars1.2k - Password authorization (bcrypt) library for Elixir.
  • elixir_teastars2 - TEA implementation in Elixir.
  • exgpgstars16 - Use gpg from Elixir.
  • potstars199 - Erlang library for generating one time passwords compatible with Google Authenticator.
  • siphash-elixirstars15 - Elixir implementation of the SipHash hash family.

    • Frameworks and Libs

    Go

  • crypto - Official Website Resources.
  • cryptoballotstars176 - Cryptographically secure online voting.
  • dedis/cryptostars419 - Advanced crypto library for the Go language.
  • gocryptostars139 - Example source code for the Practical Crypto with Go book.

    • Frameworks and Libs

    Haskell

  • Cryptography & Hashing - Official Website of Haskell.

    • Frameworks and Libs

    Haxe

  • haxe-crypto - Haxe Cryptography Library.

    • Frameworks and Libs

    Java

  • Apache Shiro - Performs authentication, authorization, cryptography and session management.
  • Bouncy Castle - All-purpose cryptographic library. JCA provider, wide range of functions from basic helpers to PGP/SMIME operations.
  • Google Keyczarstars1.1k - Easy to use, yet safe encryption framework with key versioning.

    • Frameworks and Libs

    Lua

  • LuaCryptostars81 - Lua bindings to OpenSSL.

    • Frameworks and Libs

    Objective-C

  • CocoaSecuritystars1.1k - AES, MD5, SHA1, SHA224, SHA256, SHA384, SHA512, Base64, Hex.
  • RNCryptorstars3.3k - CCCryptor (AES encryption) wrappers for iOS and Mac.

    • Frameworks and Libs

    PHP

  • TCryptostars53 - TCrypto is a simple and flexible PHP 5.3+ in-memory key-value storage library.

    • Frameworks and Libs

    Python

  • hashidsstars1.2k - Implementation of hashids in Python.
  • pynaclstars774 - Python binding to the Networking and Cryptography (NaCl) library.

    • Frameworks and Libs

    Ruby

  • RbNaClstars920 - Ruby binding to the Networking and Cryptography (NaCl) library.

    • Frameworks and Libs

    Rust

  • octavostars132 - Highly modular & configurable hash & crypto library.
  • ringstars2.3k - Safe, fast, small crypto using Rust & BoringSSL's cryptography primitives.
  • rust-opensslstars773 - OpenSSL bindings for Rust.
  • sodiumoxidestars610 - Sodium Oxide: Fast cryptographic library for Rust (bindings to libsodium).
  • surugastars120 - TLS 1.2 implementation in Rust.
  • webpkistars319 - Web PKI TLS X.509 certificate validation in Rust.

    • Frameworks and Libs

    Swift

  • CryptoSwiftstars8.5k - Crypto related functions and helpers for Swift implemented in Swift programming language.
